metadata.name: Process a Refund for a Cancelled Flight

description: A customer whose flight was cancelled by the airline is entitled to a full refund and has called to request it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's booking and verify that it is eligible for a full refund due to the airline-initiated cancellation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the booking and its refund eligibility.

nodes.task_description: Process the refund back to the customer's original form of payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates the refund in the system.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that the refund has been processed and advise them of the expected timeframe for the funds to appear in their account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the refund status and timeline.
